products.name: Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Ultra-Premium Collection---Night Edition (Pre-Order)

The Pokémon TCG: 30th Celebration Ultra-Premium Collection—Night Edition is one of the flagship products of the 30th Anniversary lineup. Built around a sleek night-inspired theme, this Ultra-Premium Collection brings together exclusive promo cards, a massive booster pack selection, premium accessories, and high-end collector presentation in one standout sealed product.
Perfect for Umbreon fans, sealed collectors, and Pokémon TCG anniversary collectors, this Ultra-Premium Collection delivers one of the most complete and collectible ways to experience the 30th Celebration expansion. Shipping begins November 6, 2026.

products.name: Mega Evolution --- Pitch Black Booster Box (Pre-Order)
products.description:
Step into total darkness where Mega Darkrai ex rules the battlefield and lightning strikes back against the shadows.
The Mega Evolution—Pitch Black Booster Box is a premium sealed product from the upcoming Pitch Black expansion, scheduled for release on July 17, 2026. This set introduces a darker, high-intensity theme centered around Mega Evolution Pokémon, with a strong focus on Mega Darkrai ex leading a roster of powerful new cards.
The expansion features over 115 cards in total, including multiple Mega Evolution ex Pokémon, Illustration Rares, and high-rarity chase cards designed for collectors and competitive players alike. 
Perfect for sealed collectors, box breaks, or competitive deck building, this booster box delivers the full Pitch Black experience in one flagship product.

Includes Illustration Rares and Special Illustration Rares
